citations.quote: Can you please contact us as soon as possible to discuss your arrears.
I have a meeting today with nika at 1pm to discuss the arrears

findings.text: Napier University requested student contact to discuss accommodation arrears on 10 Apr 2026.
Student Anfal Elbushra confirmed a meeting at 1pm on 10 Apr 2026 to discuss arrears.
The arrears amount and timeline are not stated in the available source.
Only one email thread provided; cannot cross-reference arrears amount or timeline without additional sources.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search matter sources for invoices, payment records, or correspondence containing the specific accommodation arrears amount and due dates. Cross-reference with the email thread NAP-SRC-0049 to establish a timeline.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate arrears amount and timeline from additional sources

summary: Email chain on 10 Apr 2026 shows Napier University requesting contact about accommodation arrears and student Anfal Elbushra confirming a meeting at 1pm to discuss arrears. No specific arrears amount, timeline, or payment history is provided. The source is a single email thread with no attachments or supporting documents. Further sources are needed to cross-reference the arrears amount and timeline.

uncertainties.reason: No arrears amount, due date, or payment history in source NAP-SRC-0049.
Single source limits ability to cross-reference; additional documents (e.g., invoices, ledger) needed.
